div.h1: Sequential vs Random Access: Prefetcher Effectiveness

div.p: Key Insight: Sequential access exploits spatial locality — each 64-byte cache line brings 16 floats. Random access defeats prefetcher, causing ~50x slower per-access latency. For arrays exceeding L1 cache, random can be 10-50x slower overall.

ul.li: accesses hit in same cache line
Same cache line may be loaded
